title: Extended modules (income basics, insurance concepts, planning concepts) — all neutral, non-advice
context: After the core curriculum (M1/M2) is established and piloted, extended modules on income basics, insurance concepts, and planning concepts can deepen the curriculum while staying firmly within the education-not-advice boundary. Insurance concepts and planning concepts are particularly sensitive: they must explain how these work generically without recommending any product, policy, or financial plan. Investment, retirement-allocation, and tax advice remain categorically out of scope. Each extended module follows the same pipeline: source vetting, expert sign-off, linter pass, readability and accessibility review.
objective: Draft, cite, review, and expert-sign-off extended curriculum modules on income basics, insurance concepts, and financial-planning concepts — all product-neutral, non-advice, and following the same pipeline as the core modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Income-basics module explains how income works (employment, self-employment, irregular income) in plain language without recommending specific jobs, careers, or income strategies

Insurance-concepts module explains what insurance is and how it functions generically — without recommending any specific policy, insurer, or coverage level; routes to nonprofit insurance counselors for specific guidance

Planning-concepts module explains goal-setting and basic financial planning concepts — without investment, retirement-allocation, or tax advice (those remain out of scope); routes to qualified non-commercial professionals for high-stakes decisions
All modules: all claims cited, linter-clean, readability at or below grade 8, WCAG 2.2 AA, credentialed financial-educator sign-off recorded, strings externalized for i18n
MDX frontmatter conforms to the content JSON Schema: sources[], jurisdiction='neutral', notAdviceFraming:true, license=CC-BY-4.0
Each module stays entirely within the education-not-advice boundary; investment/securities/crypto/forex/tax/legal advice remains categorically out of scope
output: Reviewed, signed-off extended modules (content/lessons/income-basics.mdx, insurance-concepts.mdx, planning-concepts.mdx) with full provenance metadata, linter-clean, accessible, plain-language, and translation-ready.
